label: Net income
basis: operating income + net interest − tax (Bearing: interest income on cash, $0 tax under NOLs, so NI is less negative than OI)

label: Net revenue retention
basis: i-12 cohort: cohort ARR now ÷ cohort ARR 12 mo ago (within-cohort expansion/contraction/churn; excludes new logos)

label: Logo retention / churn
basis: 1 − trailing-12-mo churned logos ÷ active logos 12 mo ago

label: Revenue growth (FY)
basis: FY recognized revenue ÷ prior FY − 1 (lags ARR growth via ratable recognition)

label: CAC per new logo
basis: trailing-12-mo S&M (payroll + programs, lagged 1 quarter) ÷ new logos (dollar CAC, not payback months)

label: LTV : CAC
basis: LTV (avg ARR × gross margin % × min(1 ÷ annual churn, 5 yr)) ÷ CAC (S&M lagged 1 quarter)

label: Magic number
basis: trailing-12-mo net ΔARR ÷ trailing-12-mo S&M (lagged 1 quarter)

label: Net burn
basis: − trailing-12-mo (operating + investing cash flow) ÷ 12 (avg monthly burn)

label: Rule of 40
basis: FY revenue growth % + non-GAAP operating margin % (ex-SBC)

label: Burn multiple
basis: annualized net burn ÷ trailing-12-mo net new ARR
